en.extract:
The cream-throated white-eye (Zosterops atriceps) is a species of bird in the family Zosteropidae. It is endemic to the northern Moluccas.
Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest and subtropical or tropical mangrove forest. They can be found on the Maluku Utara in Indonesia.

The '''cream-throated white-eye''' ('''''Zosterops atriceps''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Zosteropidae]]. It is [[Endemism|endemic]] to the northern [[Moluccas]].

Its natural [[habitat]]s are [[subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest]] and subtropical or tropical [[mangrove forest]]. They can be found on the [[Maluku Utara]] in [[Indonesia]].
